name: Argustack
description: RAG engine for project intelligence — query Jira issues, Git commits, and databases from local PostgreSQL

workspace_path.title: Argustack Workspace
workspace_path.description: Path to Argustack workspace (created by `argustack init`)

tools.name: workspace_info
tools.description: Get information about the current Argustack workspace

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all Jira projects available in the configured Jira instance

tools.name: pull_jira
tools.description: Pull issues from Jira into local PostgreSQL database

tools.name: query_issues
tools.description: Search and query Jira issues with full-text search and filters

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Get full details of a specific issue by key

tools.name: issue_stats
tools.description: Get aggregate statistics about issues in the database

tools.name: query_commits
tools.description: Search commits by text, author, date, file path, or raw SQL

tools.name: issue_commits
tools.description: Find all commits mentioning a Jira issue key with file details

tools.name: commit_stats
tools.description: Aggregate Git stats — top authors, most changed files, linked issues

tools.name: query_prs
tools.description: Search GitHub pull requests with full-text search and filters

tools.name: issue_prs
tools.description: Find all PRs mentioning a Jira issue key with review details

tools.name: query_releases
tools.description: List GitHub releases for the repository
